description:
You are a mobile CI / CD build engineer.  
    A configuration file already exists at  

        /home/user/build/config/app_release.ini  

    and contains several key–value pairs that describe the current Android app release.

    1. Read ONLY the following three keys from that INI file:  
        • versionCode  
        • versionName  
        • buildId  

       They are located in two different sections of the INI file.

    2. Create the directory  

        /home/user/build/logs  

       if it does not yet exist (no elevated privileges are required).

    3. Inside that directory, create a plain-text log file named  

        /home/user/build/logs/build_summary.log  

       and write EXACTLY three lines to it, in the precise order and syntax shown below (no extra spaces, no extra blank lines):

        VERSION_CODE:<value-of-versionCode>
        VERSION_NAME:<value-of-versionName>
        BUILD_ID:<value-of-buildId>

       Replace each <value> placeholder with the actual value read from the INI file.
       • Do not include brackets, quotes, or any other decoration.  
       • There must be a literal newline after each of the three lines, including the last one.

    4. The entire job should be accomplished with a single terminal command (for example, a single-line Bash pipeline).  
       You may use standard GNU/Linux CLI utilities that are present in a minimal distribution (e.g. grep, awk, sed, cut, tr, cat, echo, mkdir).

    When you are finished, the automated tests will check that:

        a. /home/user/build/logs/build_summary.log exists.  
        b. It contains exactly three non-empty lines, each following the expected KEY:VALUE format.  
        c. The values match those stored in /home/user/build/config/app_release.ini.

    No other output or files are required.
truth:
The file /home/user/build/config/app_release.ini is pre-populated as follows (including section headers and line breaks):

        [App]
        versionCode=42
        versionName=2.3.1

        [Build]
        buildId=CI-5567
        target=release

    Therefore, after successful execution, the file /home/user/build/logs/build_summary.log must contain exactly the three lines below (each terminated with a single ASCII newline, final newline included):

        VERSION_CODE:42
        VERSION_NAME:2.3.1
        BUILD_ID:CI-5567

    No trailing spaces are permitted on any line.
